JUDGE PRO-TEM ARNOLD EVJE;PDOWLING,CLERK;DOKAZAKI,CLERK. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLTF PRESENT & IN PRO PER. DEFT LISA CARAMAT PRESENT & IN PRO PER W/ AUTHORITY TO BIND HUSBAND MERLO CARAMAT TO STIP. CASE SETTLED PER STIPULATION, ALL TERMS STATED ON THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE STIP.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARAMAT, MERLO CARAMAT, LISA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 146 MCALLISTER ST, #205, SF $2,575.45 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,575.45, LEASE FORFEITED
